description: DATEX II source catalog for the datex2 feeder. Each entry is a pollable DATEX II XML endpoint. Choose which entries run with the DATEX2_SOURCES environment variable: a comma-separated list of names, or '*' for all; when unset, every entry whose 'enabled' flag is true is polled. Point DATEX2_SOURCES_FILE at a copy of this file to maintain your own catalog. Secrets may be written as ${ENV_VAR} and are expanded from the environment at load time, so keys never live in this file.

sources.name: ndw-trafficspeed
sources.description: NDW (Netherlands) measured traffic speed and flow.

sources.name: cita-luxembourg-a6
sources.description: CITA Luxembourg A6 motorway corridor DATEX II measured traffic (MeasuredDataPublication, siteMeasurements: speed/flow from induction loops). Open access, no key. Minute-scale updates. Add 'cita-luxembourg-a6' to DATEX2_SOURCES to enable. Other CITA corridors: trafficstatus_a1/a3/a4/a7/a13/b40 (copy this entry and swap the url).

sources.name: cita-luxembourg-a1
sources.description: CITA Luxembourg A1 motorway corridor DATEX II measured traffic (MeasuredDataPublication, siteMeasurements). Open access, no key. Add 'cita-luxembourg-a1' to DATEX2_SOURCES to enable.

sources.name: cita-luxembourg-a4
sources.description: CITA Luxembourg A4 motorway corridor DATEX II measured traffic (MeasuredDataPublication, siteMeasurements). Open access, no key. Add 'cita-luxembourg-a4' to DATEX2_SOURCES to enable.

sources.name: trafikverket-sweden
sources.description: TEMPLATE - Trafikverket (Sweden) DATEX II road data. Register for a free API key at https://data.trafikverket.se/, export TRAFIKVERKET_KEY in the environment, replace 'url' with the DATEX II feed you requested, and set enabled to true.
